mapper.select: SELECT address_id, customer_id, street, city, postal_code, country FROM Addresses
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Addresses ( customer_id, street, city, postal_code, country ) VALUES ( #{customer.id}, #{street}, #{city}, #{postalCode}, #{country} )
mapper.update: UPDATE Addresses SET customer_id = #{customer.id}, street = #{street}, city = #{city}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, country = #{country} WHERE address_id = #{id}
